name: Surprise Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat chocolate chips and condensed milk together in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in chopped nuts, salt, and vanilla.
4. Drop tablespoonfuls of the batter onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
5. Place a chunk of white chocolate into the center of each portion.
6. Use your fingers to press the white chocolate down into the dough and cover it completely.
7. Chill for 30 minutes before baking.
8. Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until set.
